sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n62273" key="leipuri/a" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">λειπῠρ-ία</orth>, <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">λειπῠρ-ίας</orth>, <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">λειπῠρ-ικός</orth>, <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">λειπῠρ-ιώδης</orth>, <abbr TEIform="abbr">v.</abbr> <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">λιπ</itype>-.</entryFree>
